title: fix: handle empty scribe transcription instead of returning 500
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: The sound of silence
gist.blurb: Fixed a bug where sending silent audio to our transcription API caused a server error. Now, when you say nothing at all, we politely return nothing at all.
gist.summary: Fixed an issue where the ElevenLabs Scribe integration would throw a 500 internal server error when processing audio with no detectable speech.
gist.impact: Users sending silent or noisy audio clips will now receive a successful empty transcription response instead of a server error.
gist.visual_concept: Audio transcription handling silence. Polly the bee wearing headphones, looking at a flat audio wave on the Monitor Robot's screen, representing the successful processing of silence.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, listening to a retro cassette player. Next to her, a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head displays a flat, silent audio wave on its screen glowing lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
